strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience, heavily utilizing the required primary stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct and recent hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure, MCP, and agentic workflows, fulfilling a niche technical requirement.
Exceptional background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD, including developing testing libraries and leading testing workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of specific modern frameworks requested in the job description, such as Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright.
Does not list experience with Kotlin or Python, though he does have prior experience with Java.
Historically frequent job transitions, with several earlier roles lasting less than two years.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years in the industry. His strong foundation in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud/container technologies aligns perfectly with the core requirements. Crucially, he possesses rare, hands-on experience with AI agent development and MCP. Although he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his deep expertise in TDD, test framework creation, and software architecture indicates he is an exceptional engineer who can easily adapt to specific tooling.
